Hens have gone on a strike.
Home laid, strictly fresh eggs have
gone to so cents. Not only that,
but some of the retailers are pay
ing so cents for them in trade.


Potatoes are down to $3.50 at
some stores, and apples and other
fruit are selling at reasonable
prices.


Best fresh home eggs. 40@45c doz;
eastern eggs, selected, 30@35c dog;
best local creamery butter, 45c per
pound; second grade local butter. Acc
pound; local flour. $3.50 sack of 40
pounds; Cheney flour, $1.25 sack;
lard, 19c pound; compound, 1Sc.
